prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约350名、390名、368名、423名、461名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2025年累计后移约111名，年均后移约28名；2025年基准位次约461名，为近五年最高（位次数字最大）；清华大学在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年190人、2022年188人、2023年188人、2024年186人、2025年201人、2026年（招生计划文件）206人。2025年较2024年扩招15人，2026年较2025年再扩招5人，连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争有一定缓解作用，但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位居第1名，是中国最顶尖的高等学府之一，对全国考生具有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内清华大学声誉评价为偏负面，但事件以中性为主（食堂、校园管理讨论），未见明显负面舆情冲击；抖音学校热度总排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨。2025年声誉评价为中性/混合，无投档断档记录；清华大学拥有A+学科22个（如计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、建筑学、土木工程、力学、材料科学与工程等），A类及以上学科约40个，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配，持续吸引高分考生。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华核心工科专业社会热度持续高热；临床医学、法学等专业热度偏热。北京市考生总数从2021年42037人持续增长至2025年65434人，2026年达84900人（普通高考），增幅约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；清华大学位于北京市，为本省招生，对本市考生有天然的地域偏好优势。2025年北京市综合类招生计划201人，占当年北京考生总数（65434人）约0.307%，本地招生占比极小但绝对人数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近5年累计后移约111名）、2026年北京市考生数大幅增加约29.7%（竞争加剧）、招生计划仅小幅扩招5人（缓冲有限），以及清华大学作为顶尖学府对考生的持续强吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准461名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约483名，区间433–533名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、计算机科学实验班）
- 理科试验班类（经济、金融与管理）
- 临床医学类（协和）（八年制）
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类
- 工科试验班（为先书院/笃实书院/秀钟书院等）
- 理科试验班（数理类）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与装备类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 文科试验班类（至善书院/新雅书院）
- 法学类
- 建筑类（五年制）
- 工科试验班（建筑、规划、景观）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约483名，区间433–533名。位次在预测区间内（433–533名）建议以二档工科试验班（为先/笃实/秀钟等书院）和自动化类为主攻方向，一档计算机类、临床医学（协和）作为冲刺目标，三档文科试验班和法学类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<433名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>533名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 350, 390, 368, 423, and 461 respectively, showing an overall trend of shifting backward with fluctuations. From 2021 to 2025, the cumulative backward shift was about 111 places, with an average annual shift of about 28 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 461, the highest in the past five years (largest ranking number). Tsinghua University's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing: 190 in 2021, 188 in 2022, 188 in 2023, 186 in 2024, 201 in 2025, and 206 in 2026 (from enrollment plan documents). Compared to 2024, 2025 saw an expansion of 15 students, and 2026 will expand by another 5 students compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking first in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many consecutive years. It is one of the most prestigious higher education institutions in China, exerting a strong attraction on candidates nationwide. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Tsinghua University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the events are mainly neutral (discussions on canteens and campus management), with no obvious negative public opinion impact. The university's Douyin popularity ranks second overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications. The 2025 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no record of admission gaps. Tsinghua University has 22 A+ disciplines (such as Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Architecture, Civil Engineering, Mechanics, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.), and about 40 A-level and above disciplines, with national top-tier disciplinary strength, highly matching the enrollment majors and continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at Tsinghua, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to have high social popularity; Clinical Medicine and Law are also relatively popular. The total number of candidates in Beijing has grown from 42,037 in 2021 to 65,434 in 2025, and is projected to reach 84,900 in 2026 (regular college entrance examination), an increase of about 29.7%, significantly intensifying competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, providing a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates. In 2025, the comprehensive category enrollment plan in Beijing was 201 students, accounting for about 0.307% of the total Beijing candidates (65,434), with a very small local enrollment proportion but stable absolute numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings (cumulative shift of about 111 places in the past 5 years), the significant increase of about 29.7% in the number of Beijing candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), the limited expansion of only 5 students in the enrollment plan (limited buffer), and Tsinghua University's sustained strong attraction as a top institution, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 461. The predicted minimum ranking is about 483, with a range of 433–533.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management)
- Clinical Medicine (PUMC) (Eight-Year Program)
- Electronic Information.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian College/Dushi College/Xiuzhong College, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Zhishan College/Xinya College)
- Law
- Architecture (Five-Year Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Architecture, Planning, Landscape).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 483, range 433–533. For rankings within the predicted range (433–533), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Weixian/Dushi/Xiuzhong, etc.) and Automation as main targets, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (PUMC) as reach goals, and Tier 3 Liberal Arts Experimental Class and Law as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<433), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper bound (>533), prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplementary.
